MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Age_Group_c__c AS AgeGroup__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Gender_c__c AS Gender__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.State_c__c AS UsState__c, 'USD' AS CurrencyCode__c, count(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Age_Group_c__c) AS OrderCount__c, avg(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Order_Amount_c__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS AvgOrderValue__c, sum(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Order_Amount_c__c, 'USD', 'USD')) AS TotalRevenue__c FROM Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm GROUP BY Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Age_Group_c__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.Gender_c__c, Order_Analytics_c_Home__dlm.State_c__c, 'USD'
